A clear description of what the model does and its capabilities.

## 🎯 Use Case

Describe the specific use case or application scenario.

| Item | Details |
|------|---------|

| Framework | <!-- e.g., PyTorch, ONNX, TensorFlow --> |

- [ ] Tested with rknn-toolkit2
